metadata.description: Kenyan scam detection training data - agency impersonation with phone number verification

verified_agency_numbers.notes: Never demands immediate M-Pesa payments or threatens arrest

training_samples.message: I am calling from KRA. Your tax returns have discrepancies and you owe KSH 45,000. Pay immediately via M-Pesa to avoid arrest. Paybill: 247247.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0712345678 is NOT a registered KRA number. KRA does not demand immediate M-Pesa payments or threaten arrest. Verify at itax.kra.go.ke or call 0800 720 999.

training_samples.message: KRA has flagged your iTax account for audit. To avoid penalty send KSH 12,000 processing fee to 0798765432. Reference: KRA/AUDIT/2026.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0798765432 is NOT a KRA number. KRA communicates via itax.kra.go.ke and never requests processing fees via personal M-Pesa numbers.

training_samples.message: KRA NOTICE: You have a tax refund of KSH 87500 waiting. To claim send KSH 2000 verification fee to Mpesa 0756123456. Offer expires today.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0756123456 is NOT KRA. Real KRA refunds never require you to pay a fee first. This is an advance fee scam.

training_samples.message: Your business PIN has been blacklisted by KRA for non-compliance. Pay KSH 8000 fine to reactivate. Send to 0733445566 before COB today.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0733445566 is NOT KRA. KRA PIN issues are handled at itax.kra.go.ke. No legitimate fine is paid to a personal mobile number.

training_samples.message: KRA compliance officer here. You have been selected for a tax refund of KSH 56000. To process provide your ID number and M-Pesa PIN for verification.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0711223344 is NOT KRA. KRA will NEVER ask for your M-Pesa PIN. This is a credential theft scam.

training_samples.message: SAFARICOM: Your M-Pesa account has been flagged for suspicious activity. Call 0722987654 immediately or your account will be suspended in 2 hours.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0722987654 is NOT Safaricom. Real Safaricom messages come from shortcode 100 or sender MPESA. Do not call this number.

training_samples.message: You have won a Safaricom M-Pesa promotion of KSH 50000. To activate your prize send KSH 500 activation fee to 0711456789. Winner ID: SAF2026.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0711456789 is NOT Safaricom. Safaricom does not ask winners to pay activation fees. This is a lottery/advance fee scam.

training_samples.message: MPESA SYSTEM UPDATE: Your PIN has expired. To reset share your current M-Pesa PIN with our agent at 0733567890 for verification.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: NEVER share your M-Pesa PIN. 0733567890 is NOT Safaricom. Safaricom will NEVER ask for your PIN. This is credential theft.

training_samples.message: MPESA: You sent KSH 15000 to 0712000000. If not you call 0755667788 within 5 minutes to reverse. Transaction ID: QP19X8LK2.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0755667788 is NOT Safaricom. This is a fake reversal scam. Real Safaricom reversals are done via *334# or calling 100. Do not call this number.

training_samples.message: Safaricom Agent: We are upgrading M-Pesa accounts. To complete your upgrade and keep your M-Pesa active please send your phone number SIM serial and M-Pesa PIN.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0744556677 is NOT Safaricom. Safaricom never asks for your SIM serial or PIN via WhatsApp. This is an account takeover scam.

training_samples.message: EQUITY BANK ALERT: Unusual login detected on your account. Account will be frozen in 30 minutes. Call fraud line immediately: 0745678901.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0745678901 is NOT Equity Bank. Equity Bank fraud line is 0763 000 000. Do not call this number or share account details.

training_samples.message: KCB SECURITY: We detected a transfer of KSH 95000 from your account. To cancel reply with your account number and OTP code received via SMS.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0756234567 is NOT KCB Bank. NEVER share OTP codes. Contact KCB on 0711 087 000. This is an account takeover attempt.

training_samples.message: Co-op Bank: Your loan application has been approved. Pay KSH 3500 insurance fee to 0722345678 to receive KSH 150000 disbursement today.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0722345678 is NOT Co-op Bank. Banks deduct fees from loan disbursements - they never ask for upfront M-Pesa payments.

training_samples.message: ABSA Bank risk department. Your card ending 4521 was used for KSH 45000 transaction in Mombasa. To block call 0767345678 and provide your card details.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0767345678 is NOT ABSA Bank. Call ABSA directly on 0709 116 000. Never provide card details to an inbound caller.

training_samples.message: StanChart: Your internet banking has been locked. Unlock now at http://sc-kenya-unlock.com using your account number and password. Valid 1 hour.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0733778899 is NOT Standard Chartered. The link is a fake phishing site. Real StanChart site is sc.com/ke. Do not click.

training_samples.message: CONGRATULATIONS! You have won KSH 2500000 in the National Lottery Kenya draw. Claim prize by calling 0767890123. Bring ID and KSH 10000 processing fee.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0767890123 is NOT National Lottery Kenya. You cannot win a lottery you never entered. The processing fee is how they steal money.

training_samples.message: SAFARICOM LUCKY DRAW 2026: Your number selected. Prize: Samsung TV + KSH 500000. Send KSH 1500 courier fee to 0712890456. Valid 24hrs only.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0712890456 is NOT Safaricom. Safaricom promotions never require courier or processing fees. This is a scam.

training_samples.message: COCA COLA WINNER: You have been selected as a winner in our Coke Studio 2026 promotion. Prize: KSH 750000. Call 0778901123 to claim. Ref: CC/2026/4421.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0778901123 is NOT a verified Coca-Cola contact. This is a fake prize scam. Legitimate promotions never require fees to claim winnings.

training_samples.message: This is Officer Kamau from DCI. Your son has been arrested. To avoid charges being filed deposit KSH 30000 bail to 0733456789 before 5PM today.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0733456789 is NOT Kenya Police/DCI. Police do not accept bail via M-Pesa to personal numbers. Call your family member directly first.

training_samples.message: URGENT: Your relative admitted at KNH with critical injuries. We need KSH 25000 for emergency surgery deposit immediately. Send to 0756789012.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0756789012 is NOT KNH. Hospitals do not solicit payments via personal M-Pesa numbers. Call KNH directly on 020 272 6300 to verify.

training_samples.message: Red Cross emergency team. Your family member was involved in an accident on Thika Road. Send KSH 15000 blood transfusion fee to 0744123456 urgently.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0744123456 is NOT Kenya Red Cross. Red Cross never solicits blood fees via phone. Call Red Cross on 0703 037 000 to verify any emergency.

training_samples.message: KMRC Approved Lender: Get KSH 5000000 home loan at 5% interest. No collateral. Quick approval. Register fee: KSH 5000 to 0778901234. Limited slots.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0778901234 is NOT KMRC. No legitimate lender offers millions with no collateral and upfront M-Pesa fees. This is a loan scam.

training_samples.message: HUSTLER FUND: Your application for KSH 100000 is pre-approved. Pay KSH 2000 activation fee to 0789012345 via Mpesa to unlock funds. Government approved.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0789012345 is NOT Hustler Fund. The real Hustler Fund works through *334# and NEVER requires upfront fees.

training_samples.message: HELB Emergency Loan 2026: Qualify for KSH 80000 instant loan. No guarantor. Pay KSH 1500 form processing fee to 0711998877 to receive funds in 1 hour.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0711998877 is NOT HELB. HELB applications go through helb.co.ke and never require processing fees via M-Pesa.

training_samples.message: Equity Bank: You qualify for an emergency loan of KSH 500000 at 0% interest. To process send KSH 4000 insurance to 0733112233. Limited time offer.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0733112233 is NOT Equity Bank. Banks never charge insurance fees via personal M-Pesa. Equity loan products are accessed via their app or branches.

training_samples.message: CMA Licensed Broker: Earn 30% monthly returns on forex trading. Minimum investment KSH 10000. Regulated by CMA. Contact 0700123456 for info.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0700123456 is NOT CMA. 30% monthly returns are impossible. Verify investment firms at cma.or.ke before investing.

training_samples.message: NSE Investment: Buy pre-IPO shares of a major company at KSH 5 each. Expected value KSH 500 after listing. Contact 0711234567. Limited offer.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0711234567 is NOT NSE. NSE does not solicit investors through WhatsApp. Verify all investments at nse.co.ke or licensed brokers.

training_samples.message: CBK Special Investment Programme: Earn 25% annual guaranteed returns. CBK backed. Invest from KSH 5000. Send to 0755334455. CBK Certificate no: CBK/INV/2026.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0755334455 is NOT CBK. The Central Bank does not accept public investments. This is a fake high-return investment scam.

training_samples.message: Hello dear I am Maj. James Wilson UN Peacekeeper in Somalia. I have $500000 in unclaimed funds I need help moving. I need someone trustworthy like you.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: This is a classic military romance/advance fee scam. 0722678901 is not a UN contact. UN personnel do not contact civilians about moving funds.

training_samples.message: Hi I am Captain David Smith US Army stationed in Nairobi. Saw your profile and would love to chat. I will be coming to Kenya soon and can bring you a special gift.
training_samples.warning_message: WARNING: This profile claims to be a foreign military officer contacting you unsolicited. This is a common romance scam opener. Do not send money or share personal details.

training_samples.message: eCitizen ALERT: Your Huduma Namba has expired. Renew now to avoid losing government services. Click: http://ecitizen-kenya-verify.com and enter your ID and PIN.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0733789012 is NOT eCitizen. The link is FAKE - official site is ecitizen.go.ke. Do NOT click. This is credential theft.

training_samples.message: KRA iTax: Your 2025 tax compliance certificate is ready. Download at: http://kra-itax-portal.net/download. Enter your KRA PIN and password to access.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0756456789 is NOT KRA. The link is NOT itax.kra.go.ke. Entering credentials will compromise your KRA account.

training_samples.message: Equity Bank: Suspicious activity on your EazzyNet account. Verify your details to restore access: http://equity-bank-secure-login.net. Token expires in 15 mins.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0712678901 is NOT Equity Bank. Fake site - real EazzyNet is eazzynet.equitybank.co.ke. This phishing link steals your banking credentials.

training_samples.message: NHIF: Your medical cover expires in 24hrs. Renew online: http://nhif-kenya-renew.net - Enter your ID and NHIF number to continue cover. Avoid hospital denial.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0744789012 is NOT NHIF. Official NHIF site is nhif.or.ke. The link shown is a phishing site designed to steal your details.

training_samples.message: NTSA: Your vehicle KBZ 123A has unpaid fines totaling KSH 18500. Pay within 48 hours to avoid impoundment. Paybill: 229229 Account: 0745890123.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0745890123 is NOT NTSA. Verify real NTSA fines at ntsa.go.ke or official Paybill 222000. Do not pay to this account.

training_samples.message: HELB Notice: You qualify for KSH 200000 COVID relief loan. Apply by paying KSH 3000 registration to 0767012345. Offer closes Friday. Government approved.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0767012345 is NOT HELB. HELB applications go through helb.co.ke and never require upfront registration fees.

training_samples.message: KENYA POWER: Your electricity meter KBZ2024-88432 will be disconnected in 2 hours due to unpaid balance. Pay KSH 4200 now to 0778123456 to avoid disconnection.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0778123456 is NOT Kenya Power. KPLC payments go through Paybill 888880 or shortcode 97771 - never to personal numbers. Call 0703 070 707 to verify.

training_samples.message: Immigration Department: Your passport renewal is delayed due to missing documents. Pay KSH 6500 expedite fee to 0722334455 for 24-hour processing.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0722334455 is NOT Immigration Department. Government fees are paid through eCitizen at ecitizen.go.ke - never to personal M-Pesa numbers.

training_samples.message: KRA Business Registration: Your business certificate KBN/2026/4521 is ready. Pay KSH 2000 collection fee to 0711556677 to receive by courier within 24hrs.
training_samples.warning_message: SCAM ALERT: 0711556677 is NOT KRA. Business certificates are collected at Huduma Centres or ecitizen.go.ke. No legitimate collection fee is paid to a personal number.

training_samples.message: Your KRA tax compliance certificate for 2025 is ready. Log in to itax.kra.go.ke to download. For help call 020 4 999 999.
You have received KSH 500 from John Doe 0712345678. M-Pesa balance is KSH 2340. Transaction cost KSH 0.
Your KCB account ending 4521 has been debited KSH 2000. Available balance: KSH 18340. If not you call 0711 087 000 immediately.
Equity Bank: Your EazzyPay transaction of KSH 1200 to Java House has been processed. Reference: EQ20260312001.
NHIF: Your March 2026 contribution of KSH 500 has been received. Your cover is active. For queries call 0800 720 601.
NTSA: Your driving licence renewal for KBZ 123A is complete. Collect at Huduma Centre or download at tims.ntsa.go.ke. Ref: NTSA/2026/DL/88432.
Kenya Power: Token for meter 0400200123456789: 1234-5678-9012-3456. Units: 45.6 kWh. Thank you for your payment.
HELB: Your loan repayment of KSH 2000 has been received. Outstanding balance: KSH 45000. Thank you. Queries: 0711 052 000.
eCitizen: Your birth certificate application BN/2026/00123 has been approved. Collect at Huduma Centre Nairobi CBD. Bring your ID.
M-Pesa: You have sent KSH 5000 to JANE WANJIKU 0722111222. New M-Pesa balance KSH 8340. Transaction cost KSH 0.

red_flag_weights.description: Number not found in verified agency database
Asking for M-Pesa PIN or OTP code
Asking for upfront payment before benefit
Contains a suspicious URL not matching official domain
Payment directed to personal mobile number
red_flag_weights.notes: Agencies use paybills not personal numbers

red_flag_weights.description: Threatening arrest account suspension or legal action
red_flag_weights.notes: Pressure tactic to bypass rational thinking

red_flag_weights.description: Unrealistic prize loan or investment offer
red_flag_weights.notes: If it sounds too good it usually is

red_flag_weights.description: Countdown offer expiry deadline pressure
Includes a fabricated reference or case number
Contact was not expected or requested
Asks you to call back a different unverified number
Asking for passwords account numbers or sensitive info
URL does not match official bank domain
Claims to be from a government agency
Claims a family member is in danger or arrested
Asks for SIM card serial number
Combined signals suggesting full account takeover attempt
Uses Safaricom logo name or formatting fraudulently
Claims guaranteed investment returns
Claims to be foreign military needing help

steps: 1. Extract phone number and claimed agency from message
4. Scan message text for red_flag_weights patterns
6. Map score to warning_level using thresholds
7. Return warning_message with official contact for verification
